questionEN: A developer needs to render UI from state. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да рендерира UI от state. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: View трябва основно да описва UI според подадения state.
explanationEN: View is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to prepare screen state and actions. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да подготви screen state и actions. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: ViewModel държи presentation state и user actions.
explanationEN: ViewModel is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to represent app data rules. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да представи app data rules. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Model описва domain data и rules.
explanationEN: Model is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to perform reusable external work. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да изпълни reusable external work. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Service капсулира работа като loading, networking или persistence.
explanationEN: Service is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to hide data source details. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да скрие data source details. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Repository предоставя data API без ViewModel да знае storage details.
explanationEN: Repository is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to pass dependencies from outside. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да подаде dependencies отвън. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Dependency Injection прави типовете по-testable и по-слабо coupled.
explanationEN: Dependency Injection is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to keep one reason to change. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да запази една причина за промяна. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Single Responsibility намалява complexity и side effects.
explanationEN: Single Responsibility is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to separate navigation decisions. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да раздели navigation decisions. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Coordinator може да изолира navigation flow от views.
explanationEN: Coordinator is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to publish changes to SwiftUI. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да публикува changes към SwiftUI. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Observable state позволява UI да реагира на промени.
explanationEN: Observable state is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to centralize UserDefaults keys. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да централизира UserDefaults keys. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Store намалява duplicate keys и улеснява migrations.
explanationEN: UserDefaults store is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to define testable contracts. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да дефинира testable contracts. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Protocol описва contract и позволява mocks.
explanationEN: Protocol is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to replace real dependency in tests. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да замени real dependency в tests. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Mock позволява контролирано поведение в unit tests.
explanationEN: Mock is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to verify state transitions. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да провери state transitions. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Unit tests са бързи за ViewModel и business logic.
explanationEN: Unit test is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to avoid mixing UI and persistence. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избегне смесване на UI и persistence. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Separation of concerns прави code paths по-ясни.
explanationEN: Separation of concerns is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to store business meaning. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да пази business meaning. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Domain model представя concepts от problem space.
explanationEN: Domain model is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to represent API payload shape. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да представи API payload shape. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: DTO е data transfer shape, често различен от domain model.
explanationEN: DTO is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to convert DTO to domain. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да конвертира DTO към domain. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Mapper отделя transport format от app model.
explanationEN: Mapper is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to encapsulate one business action. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да капсулира едно business action. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Use case държи конкретна operation отделена от UI.
explanationEN: Use case is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to recognize too many responsibilities. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да разпознае твърде много responsibilities. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: God Object знае и прави прекалено много неща.
explanationEN: God Object is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to model loading success failure. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да моделира loading success failure. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: State machine прави allowed states и transitions ясни.
explanationEN: State machine is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to show safe failure UI. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да покаже safe failure UI. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Error boundary предотвратява crash-like UX и показва recovery.
explanationEN: Error boundary is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Architecture & MVVM workflow.
